poems.title: Lights Off
poems.image_url: PLACEHOLDER — upload to Supabase before going live
poems.text:
you cannot hide
from your shadow,
unless you live
with the lights
off.

poems.title: Permission
poems.image_url: PLACEHOLDER — upload to Supabase before going live
poems.text:
morning, again,
arrives without
asking permission —
and I, again,
forgive it.

poems.title: Forever, Defined
poems.image_url: PLACEHOLDER — upload to Supabase before going live
poems.text:
my love, how do
you define forever?
it is back then,
it is not yet,
it is right here,
right now.

poems.title: Company
poems.image_url: PLACEHOLDER — upload to Supabase before going live
poems.text:
I keep the window
open for a draft
I never name —
call it company.

poems.title: Downstream
poems.image_url: PLACEHOLDER — upload to Supabase before going live
poems.text:
what the river
takes, it returns
as someone
else's rain.
